actions.name: 调入专属产品信息
actions.caption: 调入专属产品信息
actions.expression:
SELECT zscp.sid,
       zscp.cpbh,
       zscp.yytp,
       zscp.cpggz,
       zscp.zwpm,
       zscp.jldw,
       zscp.cgdj,
       zscp.zhwbzh,
       zscp.chpkzh,
       zscp.caiziz,
       zscp.houd,
       zscp.bh123,
       zscp.dh123,
       zscp.qtczz,
       zscp.sccj,
       zscp.bjry
FROM zscp 
WHERE (zscp.cpbh=[工厂开模.产品编号]) 
ORDER BY zscp.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 调入收入财务信息
actions.caption: 调入收入财务信息
actions.expression:
SELECT cyzglsheet.sid,cyzglsheet.xm 
FROM cyzglsheet 
WHERE (cyzglsheet.zm="开模收回财务") 
  AND (cyzglsheet.bz=[工厂开模.我方公司]) 
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 调入业务员信息
actions.caption: 调入业务员信息
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[工厂开模.业务人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 生产厂家编辑框
actions.caption: 生产厂家编辑框
actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.company_name 
FROM zycs 
ORDER BY zycs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 模具厂家编辑框
actions.caption: 模具厂家编辑框
actions.expression:
SELECT zycs.company_name 
FROM zycs 
WHERE   (zycs.company_name like concat("%",[工厂开模.生产厂家],"%"))
ORDER BY zycs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 专属货号调入专属产品信息
actions.caption: 专属货号调入专属产品信息
actions.expression:
SELECT zscp.sid,
       zscp.cpbh,
       zscp.yytp,
       zscp.cpggz,
       zscp.zwpm,
       zscp.jldw,
       zscp.cgdj,
       zscp.zhwbzh,
       zscp.chpkzh,
       zscp.caiziz,
       zscp.houd,
       zscp.bh123,
       zscp.dh123,
       zscp.qtczz,
       zscp.sccj,
       zscp.bjry
FROM zscp 
WHERE (zscp.cpbh=[工厂开模.专属货号]) 
ORDER BY zscp.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT zycjcpsheet3.rid,
       zycjcpsheet3.kmgc,
       zycjcpsheet3.mjsl,
       zycjcpsheet3.tzqr,
       zycjcpsheet3.tzhs,
       zycjcpsheet3.clqr,
       zycjcpsheet3.clhs,
       zycjcpsheet3.smwc,
       zycjcpsheet3.smhs,
       zycjcpsheet3.hqqr,
       zycjcpsheet3.hqhs,
       zycjcpsheet3.cqqr,
       zycjcpsheet3.cqhs,
       zycjcpsheet3.qtsm
FROM cjcp,zycjcpsheet3 
WHERE (cjcp.cpbh=[工厂开模.开模编号]) 
  AND (cjcp.rid=zycjcpsheet3.pid) 
  AND permission('专业产品')
ORDER BY cjcp.sid ASC,zycjcpsheet3.sid ASC

actions.name: 费用申请
actions.caption: 费用申请
actions.expression:
SELECT fysq.sid 
FROM fysq 
WHERE (fysq.bfdh=:bfdh) 
ORDER BY fysq.sid ASC
